question: Tell me about yourself and walk me through your academic and project background.
Why did you choose computer science / your field of study?
What are your top three strengths? Give an example for each.
What is your biggest weakness and what have you done to improve it?
Where do you see yourself five years from now?
Describe a time you faced a challenging deadline and how you handled it.
Tell me about a time you failed. What did you learn from it?
Describe a situation where you went above and beyond what was expected.
Tell me about a time you disagreed with your manager or team lead. How did you resolve it?
Give an example of a time you had to quickly learn a new technology or tool.
Describe a project where you had to work with an underperforming team member.
Tell me about a time you had to manage multiple priorities simultaneously.
Describe a situation where you showed leadership without having a formal leadership role.
Give an example of a time you received critical feedback. How did you respond?
How do you handle conflict within a team?
Describe your ideal team. What role do you naturally take?
Have you ever led a team project? What challenges did you face?
How do you motivate team members who are losing interest in a project?
Why do you want to work at our company specifically?
What do you know about our products and what excites you about them?
How does this role align with your career goals?
What do you look for in a workplace culture?
Are you comfortable working in a fast-paced startup environment?
How do you handle working under pressure or tight deadlines?
Describe a stressful work/academic situation and how you managed it.
How do you prioritise tasks when everything feels urgent?
What does integrity mean to you in a professional context?
Have you ever had to make an ethical decision at work or college? What happened?
Tell me about a time you took initiative without being asked.
What motivates you to do your best work every day?
How do you keep yourself updated with new technologies or industry trends?
Do you prefer working independently or in a team? Why?
What is the most impactful project you have worked on and why?
If we hire you, what would you accomplish in your first 90 days?
